category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the OpenCL Installable Client Driver loader; Khronos GitHub README describes the official OpenCL ICD Loader.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses OpenCL ICD Loader wording; official Khronos repository title is OpenCL ICD Loader.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains build and usage notes; Khronos OpenCL Registry links the ICD loader and OpenCL ICD installation guide/specification.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/KhronosGroup/OpenCL-ICD-Loader; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OpenCL ICD loader; Khronos README says it exports OpenCL API entry points, enumerates implementations, and forwards calls.
